name: tellonce
description: Automatic preference/pitfall/friction detection and memory enforcement for AI coding agents (Codex variant: audit log + wrapper enforcement via tellonce_codex).

interface.shortDescription: Records and enforces your coding-agent preferences
interface.longDescription: tellonce watches each turn, records the preferences, pitfalls and workflow rules it detects, and can enforce the ones you care about. Safe by default: out of the box it only records and reminds.
